title: Property Consultant - Supertech - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Supertech - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Supertech has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Supertech:
Supertech is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Supertech!
